ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED BY THE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT

DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT HANONO, BRAM AS TO PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT HANONO, BRAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THIS CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA HANONO, BRAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT BORROWMAN. PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. DEFENDANT BRAM HANONO IS PRESENT. THE COURT RULES THAT DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL IS DENIED AND THE CASE WILL BE ADJUDICATED ON ITS MERITS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT PEARSON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANONO, BRAM $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,375.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $2300 AS REIMBURSEMENT FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF CONTRACT. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF MATERIALLY BREACHED THE CONTRACT BY FAILING TO PROVIDE REQUIRED NOTICE AND USING AN UNAPPROVED FITTING SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAS ENTITLED TO TERMINATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HANONO, BRAM
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED VIA MAIL.
